title: Ep 22: Notion AI Engineer Linus Lee: Behind the Scenes of Notion AI
full_text: Linus Lee is an AI engineer at Notion, one of the earliest and most effective adopters of AI. In the episode, Linus shares how Notion developed its AI products, including Writer, Autofill, and Q&A, which just launched on Tuesday. It was fascinating to learn how Notion structures its AI team and dogfoods its development process. Linus also explores the hardest to anticipate when going to market with new AI features, and how Notion thinks of its LLM partnerships. Overall, a wide-ranging conversati

Linus Lee is an AI engineer at Notion, one of the earliest and most effective adopters of AI.
In the episode, Linus shares how Notion developed its AI products, including Writer, Autofill, and Q&A, which just launched on Tuesday.
It was fascinating to learn how Notion structures its AI team and dogfoods its development process.
Linus also explores the hardest to anticipate when going to market with new AI features, and how Notion thinks of its LLM partnerships.
